strengths: 15+ years of deep software engineering experience across full-stack, embedded, and cloud-native systems
Direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP, agentic workflows)
Entrepreneurial background with open-source platform development (GISCollective) and startup-like initiatives
concerns: Limited explicit AI/ML product or platform experience in traditional job roles (focus appears more on general software engineering)
No advanced degree (MS/PhD) in an AI-related field, despite extensive experience
Entrepreneurial experience exists but lacks clear alignment with AI strategy or cloud platform scaling
response.justification: Aisha has strong software engineering credentials with 15+ years of experience and recent AI-agent infrastructure work, but lacks explicit AI product/strategy leadership or advanced AI-focused roles. Her entrepreneurial background is promising but not directly tied to AI strategy or cloud platforms. The role requires deep AI expertise and strategic product vision, which are not fully demonstrated in the resume.
